#  Sync and Download Drawings (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' or higher permissions to the Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * If you or another team member marks up a drawing while offline, or someone uploads a new version, you will need to re-sync the changes while on an internet or network connection in order to view the most current information.
    * You can see which drawings have already been downloaded to your device already by placing your device in Airplane Mode and then navigating to the Drawings tool in the Procore app.


##  Steps 
  1. Open the **Procore** app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the project's **Drawings** tool.
  3. If your drawings include multiple areas, tap the area that you want to download drawings from.


The first time you open the Drawings tool for a project, you'll need to download drawings before you can view them. See the following sections:
  * Download Drawings by Discipline
  * Download Drawings Individually


To check for updates to drawings, use the Sync button. See Sync Current Drawings.
#### Download Drawings by Discipline
  * Tap **Download** ![Drawings Ios Download Drawings By Discipline](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/23b43bbee3b2227140489969e77b8e4d/8511f1926e5e152dffa630d728c50870/drawings-ios-download-drawings-by-discipline.png?fm=webp)_  
Note:_ All drawings in the selected discipline will be downloaded.


#### Download Drawings Individually
  1. Tap a drawing discipline to see its drawings.
  2. Tap **Download**   
![Drawings Ios Download Drawings](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/be609401d1f47e9602cab3d797ae9f06/79a3fdf7e491f859ef906ea62e218faf/drawings-ios-download-drawings.png?fm=webp)  
_Note:_ This action will download the most recent version of the drawing to your device.


#### Sync Current Drawings
To check for updates on drawings that have been downloaded to your device, you can sync drawings.
  * Tap **Sync**.  
![Drawings Ios Sync Drawings](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d4f67570abf00bfba9143ba9d9f6ca64/72102fc06eebf0329cbe9d2d38f9fa3d/drawings-ios-sync-drawings.png?fm=webp)_  
Note:_ Procore will begin looking for the new markups or versions of drawings.


## See Also

  * [Link Observations to a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/link-observations-to-a-drawing-ios)
  * [View Drawings (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/view-drawings-ios)

description: How to sync and download drawings on the Procore iOS app.
